## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Braze and GrowthX for content strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers expert-led, AI-augmented content creation and strategy services](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Braze has opportunities to improve content quality, SEO, and conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes an 8-week strategy sprint to demonstrate value and set strategy](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Approach to Content Creation

  - [Expert-led process augmented by AI tools and APIs](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Focus on maintaining high quality at scale](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [Customized workflows for research, writing, fact-checking, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Emphasis on understanding client's business context and audience](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Braze's Content Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Resources section drives only \~5% of organic traffic despite 1,400 pages](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Potential to improve SEO rankings for key terms (e.g., push notifications)](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [Opportunity to create more targeted, conversion-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Need for better topic clustering and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)

### GrowthX's Differentiators

  - [Ability to handle large content footprints efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [Integration of SEO, LLM visibility, and business strategy](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Full-service approach including graphics, staging, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [Track record with similar B2B SaaS companies (Webflow, Ramp, Okta, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)

### Proposed Engagement Model

  - [8-week strategy sprint to start](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Includes strategy development, content auditing, and immediate execution](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Typically produce 20-30 content pieces during this period](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Dedicated team including directors, managing editors, and support staff](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Braze team to attend GrowthX workshop tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [Follow up next week after the workshop to discuss potential next steps](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)
  - [Consider the 8-week strategy sprint as a starting point for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/mouAVvZsMmtfvMcod2XxEhgp5mnLcPZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)
